hero.role: Senior Front End Developer & UI/UX Designer with 13+ Years Experience

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Me
about.description: I am a passionate Senior Frontend Developer with over 13 years of experience in crafting beautiful, high-performance web applications. My expertise lies in React, Angular, and modern CSS frameworks, combined with a strong eye for UI/UX design.
about.p1: Tools, technologies, and practices I use to build performant web applications.
about.p2: I'm a seasoned developer specializing in frontend architecture and high-quality user interfaces. With a decade of experience, I bring a unique blend of technical expertise and creative problem-solving to every project.
about.p3: I love building scalable software that provides a seamless user experience. My goal is to always stay on the cutting edge of web technology.
about.skill1_desc: Expert in React, Angular, and modern JavaScript.
about.skill2_desc: Creating intuitive and responsive user interfaces.
about.skill3_desc: Designing scalable and maintainable web applications.

experience.title: Work
experience.subtitle: Experience
experience.exp1_desc: Leading dynamic teams to build enterprise-scale React applications.
experience.exp2_desc: Designing high-fidelity prototypes and implementing design systems.
experience.exp3_desc: Developing robust Shopify and WooCommerce themes.
experience.exp4_desc: Building responsive websites with modern web standards.
experience.exp5_desc: Learning and implementing basic frontend features.
experience.exp6_desc: Providing custom web solutions for local businesses.
experience.exp7_desc: Assisting senior developers with coding and testing tasks.
experience.exp8_desc: Gaining foundational knowledge in computer science.
